phrases.title: Capture durable learnings
phrases.value: Review this session for durable learnings worth preserving: user preferences, reusable instructions, architecture decisions, debugging insights, project knowledge, workflow improvements, documentation updates, tests, runbooks, or backlog items. Propose additions or changes. Exclude temporary, speculative, redundant, or low-value details.

phrases.title: Ask questions before proceeding
phrases.value: Before you proceed, ask any questions needed for clarification. If you don’t have questions, proceed.

phrases.title: Save tokens
phrases.value: Spend tokens on analysis, implementation, and verification rather than chat. Omit conversational filler, praise, apologies, and restatements of my request. Do not narrate routine steps.

variables.name: Swimmer's build
variables.value: A classical swimmer’s physique: athletic, broad-shouldered, and naturally powerful, with smooth, voluminous musculature defined by rounded anatomical forms rather than sharp striations. Prioritize continuous sculptural flow, natural proportions, a refined waist, proportionate trapezius muscles, and an elegant V-shaped silhouette. Avoid hyper-vascularity, exaggerated definition, or bodybuilding aesthetics. Render the anatomy with soft tonal transitions and sculptural volume, evoking polished Greco-Roman marble while remaining fully integrated into the source artwork’s medium, lighting, and level of abstraction. Use classical chiaroscuro to emphasize form through luminous highlights and deep, velvety shadows.
